content: posted the q
idk how long they take to respond
i took my time finding this, sorry
and of course the most egregious of them all were the tawil wing card names which just
tbf o can see what they were going for with those
trying to convey tawil's godliness
just doesn't fit with the card game presentation
how is Six Wing more godly than Hexad Wings
six wings is the second round
after people complained the new ones were too long
it used to be some really long shit
like dual wings unfurled or something
then for clarity it was made as short as possible
the thing is the old, even mtl wings arguably was a better translation that both was very tawil-like and weren't impeding on game experience
i think removing just "unfurled" would have done the job without removing flavor
maybe i just like six wings remembrance too much
hold on let me look up exactly what it was
also iirc the old 2 wings was just wings unfurled
oh yeah i like the mtl ones best of all
but i think after the backlash
they didnt wanna risk having anything that could be long
you might be able to get it changed if you complain
the backlash was also just nonsense as well
nah tawil was a pain
it was super unclear gameplay wise
like what do you mean you can't differentiate "dual" from "quad" from "hexad"
its not that you can't
hold on
ok back
the problem wans't the dual quad hexad
the problem was that, with how morimens cards are designed, the card name scroll if they're too long
and the card names were 'dual wings unfurled', 'quad wings unfurled', etc
so what would end up happening
is you would have a hand full of tawil cards with scrolling names
i feel like the translations shouldn't have to suffer because of that
so you get to read 'wings unfurled' a bunch
but its already scrolled past the 'dual' or 'quad'
they fixed wanda and lily 4 cost scrolling when selected
i agree in an ideal world but I feel like it's a case of like. the translator can only request so much gameplay resources
they can surely fix this one as well
and changing the fundametal UI of how cards are displayed is probably a bit much
so this works as like a. bandaid fix
I don't think it's ideal but tbh everything I've read from the translator makes it seem like they're swamped with work
i really don't think it's too much but what do i know, i only just work with unity every few months, maybe too many things rely on this scrolling card text in the background
yeah...
i've learned that with gamedev sometimes the smallest shit takes forever to change/fix
i mean if they can fix wanda and lily cards, they can fix this as well
could be a thing to throw in the translation suggestion chat then if they have a function for it
also are these lovecraft references? I thought it was just like. different phrasing (which is better and worse wheel by wheel imo)
though you might also get pushback from the 'simple tawil card names' cabal

Iirc from a localization note, they're familiar with the lore, but terms can get weird and they also decided to keep Aliemus so...

And yeah iirc JP voice says Akuto
Several things to take into account
i kinda like aliemus tbh. I think calling it madness would've been a little confusing for new players
easily to slot it into your mind as just a 'weird latin word'
like arithmetica

That being said, Light did mention in the new tl post that they'd put more work into actually putting a better quality translation with priority from the start to finish, and catch up over time 

So better defined terms from the beginning

and going back to this, the only part i could actually see in the mistranslation report channel was "please change it back to the old version" and https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1350058928020656178/1366413247233654815

Which is a priority that makes sense to me, player retention will only get higher

Vets are used to waiting for proper translation <:pepehaha:416233159454359552> and translation will end up catching up at some point anyway
i feel like I remember there being a lot of complaining in gen chat but my memory might be making up things

<:flop2:1356053072924774421> 
maybe im just too vexed by the current translations to be more cognizant of what i'm referencing, my bad, i don't think they are

i just don't trust the translation as much after how off the new ch1 feels
if there wasn't much pushback in the thread though i'd suggest popping a suggestion in there for changing it back to the MTL translations or fixing the card scroll
tbf it's mostly just proofreading, they're changing it to proper localization now right?
i know a *lot* of people complained about the length of the word or brought up points like not knowing what dual, quad, or hexad was
you're not misremembering
imo timestrung pinions was shorter than current TL
easier to remember as well
idk, i'm just also really annoyed at the tawil boss fight in the prologue
you're met with this majestic being and their most powerful attack is called "Six Wings"
okay yeah they've could've kept the proper translation for that lol
true, "Six Wings" is kinda just
there's no presence there
though I def think there could be a change there if you suggested it
I think the problem is it's only like. 1 translator and they seem reallllly overworked
so a lot of stuff slips through the cracks
people have vocalized their willingness to help translate the game
i know of two people at least
cassius and niko
getting fan translators is wayyyyy more complicated than it seems tho
@~@ yeah
like you gotta factor in budget, skill, legal stuff....
i think they're working towards it? but I'm not surprised it takes a while
if there was an option to like. mod in our own translation files that'd probably make it faster since you could slip past all the bureacratic stuff
but idk how difficult it'd be to allow us to mod our own translation
if it's proofreading then there's still cracks to be mended there, you can see the latest complaints about ch1 in <#1350058928020656178>
hi 0/
hi niko
oh yeah I saw that, seeing sean and shawn was really funny lol
but again. not surprised with the overworked translator
having to do liveservice translation + old chapter translation means a lot of shit can be swept under the rug
in defense of that, both spellings are pronounced the same way, so i can understand the confusion
i'm not saying the translation is good as it is but I'm hesitant to be like. its the translator's fault
rather than the constraints
game dev is hell
if you read an article about how any game with a big budget is written you'll cry
that's an english fallacy though
oh not this really, just complaints about pieces of narration feeling off
i don't think you can blame the translator for it
weird... wording
oh yeah
yeah im not blaming the translator, im saying its one of the edge cases where i can forgive spelling variations
honestly I think the mistake was like. putting it in the patch notes that they did translation for ch1-3
instead of being like. we did a beta pass, pls give feedback
think it gave people the wrong expectations
i am a little sad we're gonna be back to full AI translation for the most recent chapters <:cry2:1356068126894194758>
but it makes sense business wise
i suppose i shouldn't complain too much
they aren't just translating the scripts either, they have to do a bunch of side coding that had nothing to do with translation lol
yup, that's how we got defend cards saying DEF or "Recommended" in the wheel equip menu saying HOT

honestly i think complaints are great, just gotta like. figure out a way to put em constructively and throw em in the suggestions thread. they can't improve if they don't know how, and even if they're slow to fix it, it's better than them not knowing there's an issue
though i guess a bunch of other people have been throwing their feedback in as well

there was a reddit post saying they had to lend the team a hand in keyword optimization which lead to this incident <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> like damn, when I look at that post I'm horrified, they're walking into hell as new recruit right off the bat
oh god yeah that's probably also why the fan translation thing is slow
tho imo adding more "suggestion" on their hit list is good bcuz it give them direction
lots of coding work to even get a translation tool that can be read/used by non-coders
it was why I'm quite insistent on using Gate instead of Gateway lol

indie game moment
or minor stuffs like changing Time of Celestial Alignment to When The Stars Are Right
yeah
i love the devs but I do get a sense that the behind the scenes programming is a bit of a mess
i feel like i shouldn't be the one to make the post since, compared to the other people that frequent here, i know really little
judging from the fact that the game doesn't run smooth as butter despite being graphically simple
it's probably a big pile of mess like Lobotomy Corporation coding lol
